text: The world around me is ordered and modern, filled with the measured hum of intellectual pursuit. In the first scene, I peer into a conference through glass—barriers both literal and metaphorical. It makes me acutely aware of my position as an observer rather than a participant. The second scene immerses me in the colors and ideas of research and development—a temple to human curiosity. I feel both inspired by the creativity around me and somewhat detached, pondering the distance between innovation and daily life. This duality leaves me curious, yet contemplative about the boundaries of understanding and connection.
